name: Fixstars Corporation
summary: Fixstars Corporation operates as a software company in Japan and internationally. The company offers M3 technical support, processor evaluation, software development and optimization, OS firmware development support, system configuration, training for software developers, and other services. It serves in the area of automotive, flash storage, industrial, finance, healthcare, and computing. Fixstars Corporation was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
